programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott crisscross the Welsh border looking for antique goodies, but finding things that don't require two strong assistants to carry them is not easy.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Henry es el testigo clave en el caso de Danny y Baez, su constante intromisión molesta tanto a Danny que termina llevándolos a una pista valiosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es baleado por un miembro de una banda rival en el patio de su escuela, Danny y Baez intentan controlar la situación para evitar más incidentes, pero el director, Darryl Ward (Ernie Hudson), actúa imprudentemente por su cuenta.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny piensa en aceptar un nuevo trabajo que podría resolver sus problemas financieros después de investigar la muerte de un hombre rico.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a San Francisco cuando una serie de asesinatos lleva a creer que El asesino del Zodíaco podría haber regresado. Mientras tanto, Reid reflexiona si podría hacer algo más con sus habilidades de genio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo es llamado para buscar a un violador en serie de Houston conocido como El pianista, que ha vuelto y está atacando a sus víctimas anteriores. Por otra parte, Prentiss comienza un tratamiento por la experiencia traumática causada por Ian Doyle.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Trabajando con los oficiales locales, el equipo de NCIS cree que un marinero murió de una sobredosis involuntaria en una sórdida parte de la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo colaboran con un inspector de la Agencia Internacional de Energía Atómica que sufre de envenenamiento por radiación. Recreando su rutina, intentan descubrir donde y cómo se produjo la contaminación.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky y Abby confirman que han identificado los restos de al menos cinco personas, el equipo de NCIS comienza inmediatamente a notificar a sus familias, con la intención de encontrar una conexión entre la azarosa selección de víctimas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Descubren que el niño tiene hermanos que también están en peligro.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Greg, para su competencia final, tiene que determinar cómo fue asesinado el Sherlock Holmes de un club de Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a young archaeologist who may have unearthed the answer to one of New York City's oldest murder mysteries.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: La estafa maestra

programme.title: Fuera del cielo

programme.title: Hannibal

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Yo, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Adam, un monstruo creado por Frankenstein, se da cuenta de que su verdadera misión es salvar a la humanidad después de encontrarse en medio de una guerra entre dos clanes inmortales de demonios y gárgolas.

programme.title: Guerra mundial Z
programme.desc: Guerra Mundial Z es una acelerada epopeya de lo que podrían ser los últimos días de la raza humana. El ex colaborador de la ONU Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) es llamado para ayudar a acabar con la caótica pandemia que se extiende por el mundo.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Yo, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Adam, un monstruo creado por Frankenstein, se da cuenta de que su verdadera misión es salvar a la humanidad después de encontrarse en medio de una guerra entre dos clanes inmortales de demonios y gárgolas.

programme.title: Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: In this powerful tale of courage, determination, and the pioneering spirit that defined an era, a young woman bravely sets out with her children in tow to claim a homestead - and a brand new life - in the untamed West after her husband is killed.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: Run For Cover
programme.desc: Ex-criminal in the old days of the West teaches a woman the ways of love and a boy the art of courage.

programme.title: Man With The Gun
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: Little Big Man
programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: Valdez Is Coming
programme.desc: In this rousing Western, when a greedy rancher causes the death of an innocent man, former sheriff Bob Valdez (Burt Lancaster) orders him to provide financial support for the widow. But when he refuses, Valdez vows to exact justice at any cost!

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: What's New Pussycat?
programme.desc: Peter Sellers, Peter O'Toole and Woody Allen star in this wacky chapter from the swinging '60s where therapy becomes hilarity

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient
programme.desc: Peter Sellers stars as a hilariously seedy concert pianist who is nearly driven mad after he becomes the obsession of two crush-crazed schoolgirls in this poignant, funny look at innocence lost. Angela Lansbury and Paula Prentiss also star.

programme.title: After The Fox
programme.desc: Pretending to be a movie director, an Italian crook known as The Fox (Peter Sellers) cons local villagers and the police into smuggling into Rome the loot from a $3 million Cairo bullion robbery...as part of the film script!

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1964)
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: The hilarious, accidentally brilliant Inspector Clouseau once again takes on his archenemy, the insane Dreyfus, as he plots to control the world.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie each have dates the same night. Due to a mix up in names, Mike picks up Robbie's young date (Trudi Ames), and Robbie picks up an older woman (Carole Costello), meant for Mike.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob has to find a television set to watch a TV show for Alan Brady.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Sally and Buddy learn that Alan Brady is cutting down his writing staff.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A film crew takes over the Petrie house during Mille and Jerry's wedding anniversary party.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The 'The Alan Brady Show' writing staff realizes they've sent Alan a script without first removing their insults.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes a fight promoter when he meets up with a young local plumber with the size and strength of a gorilla.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A week in New York City transforms Betty Jo from a country girl into a svelte sophisticate.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe's, arch-enemy of the Hooterville Cannonball, returns to Hooterville Valley in adject disgrace and poverty.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: One of Kate's old flames pays a visit,but his efforts to rekindle their romance are thwarted by his dominating sister.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes the new postmaster of Hooterville and moves the post office to the Shady Rest hotel.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Joe enters a contest sponsored by Gibney's Old English Tomato Sauce and wins first prize-an English butler.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer befriends a couple who claim Camp Henderson is on their land.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's cooking skills might get him assigned to the kitchen permanently.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer tries to help a night club comedian who is about to be fired.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer becomes involved in a Hungarian family feud when he spends the weekend with a friend.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer sneaks a baby onto the base when he babysits for a friendâ€"just as the colonel is due on an inspection tour.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and Carter buy Hong Kong suits from con man Friendly Freddy.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer tries to convince his friends that a movie star has invited them all to a barbecue at her house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is mad over the town's dirt road, especially when he finds out that the state set aside money over thirty years ago to fix it. Oliver goes to the Capitol to get the road paved but hits a roadblock when the Ziffels' house must be torn down.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney discovers an old wish book dating back to 1898 that tells the story of Calvin and Tessie Whittaker who once owned the Douglases' farm and how Calvin traveled to Hollywood to pitch his idea of putting a mouse named Dickey into films.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Sam Drucker does not stock any cosmetics in his store, much to the chagrin of Lisa. Lisa decides to set up a 'small' display in the store. When the merchandise is delivered, it forces Mr. Drucker to retreat to the front porch.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver plants his crops, worrying that they haven't been planted in time for a harvest. Lisa tries to be helpful and mixes up a batch of sour lemonade. Oliver pours out the bitter elixir in the newly planted field, with an unimaginable consequence.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has been invited to give a speech at the Bar Association. He is there to advocate for the hiring of ex-convicts. He eventually ends up regretting his speech when he is forced to hire an ex-convict by the name of Willie Dunhill.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver goes to New York to finish up a case at his old firm. Meanwhile back on the farm, Lisa and Eb find a puppy left on the doorstep. Lisa, in all her innocence, leads Oliver to believe the puppy, affectionally named Freddie, is a human baby.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Hank Kimball proposes marriage to lady carpenter Ralph Monroe while under the influence of heavy medication. Lisa plans an amazing country wedding only to find out that, Sam, the Justice of the Peace, has forgotten to new his license.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby and J.R. investigate a scuba diving death that seems unlikely to have happened the way it was reported. What they discover is more death and over $1,000,000 in jade art objects at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby, J.R., and Betty investigate a 10 year old kidnapping case after a man identifying himself as Scorpio calls a family offering to return his long lost daughter in exchange for a $250,000 ransom.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Jackie Cooper guest stars as Dr. Alex Southmore, who becomes a suspect in the investigation of his wife's murder when McGarrett finds holes in the confessed killer's story.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett receives calls and clues from a man saying he will kill somebody important in 48 hours. His only clue to the identity of the victim: a key sent by the anonymous assailant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett fears a gangland war is imminent when it seems a mainland syndicate is trying to take over criminal operations. Criminal operations up to this time have been under the control of four unfriendly families.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A syndicate boss seeks revenge when his light-heavyweight boxer's hand is smashed by a punchy ex-fighter. McGarrett and his Five-O team desperately search for the punchy attacker, not only to bring him to justice but also, to protect him from the mobster.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett searches for an ecology fanatic whose pranks are harmless until he threatens the lives of those he feels are the cause of the island's pollution. The islanders are sympathetic to the prankster — until he carries out his threat of murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Twelve years ago, Joanne (Lois Nettleton) convinced two friends to testify against their pimp for the murder of a prostitute. Now, three convicts escape from prison, and one of them is out for revenge against the women who sent him to prison.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tragically, a tiny newborn infant is found dead in the Sparta city dump, and more than just the teenage mother is suspect. Virgil (Howard Rollins) tries to unravel the heartbreaking story of a young teenage girl who was left by her baby's father.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs investigates a series of elderly citizens that are being beaten and robbed. Things become more complicated as Detective Tibbs in-laws are visiting from Philadelphia trying to get him and his wife to move back home.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs and Sweet investigate a woman who has been beaten and left for dead on the banks of a local creek. Tibbs, in particular, takes an interest in this possible wife-beating case and, in the process, unlocks part of his difficult and painful past.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs and Chief Bill Gillespie investigate a murder of a father of two very different daughters who are caught up in a case of intense sibling rivalry...one that may have led one or both of them to murder.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A soon-to-retire narcotics cop roughs up a drug pusher and frames him, leading to blackmail and murder. Meanwhile, an investigation into a major drug ring known as the "Tucson connection" unfolds in San Francisco.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When fellow workers at a labor camp nickname Richard Kimble Doc it prompts three criminals, who have kidnapped a boy, to draft him into service when the boy is hurt.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble is forced to defy hurricane warnings to transport a couple from the mainland to the Florida Keys.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble happens to be in the background when a sidewalk photographer snaps some newlyweds and it leads to concentrated trouble.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver inherits a vintage car and a whole lot of trouble when his grandfather passes away.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to East Berlin in search of a friend’s lost granddaughter.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After testifying against him in his bid for freedom, MacGyver becomes the target of an escaped mass murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's patient and shock-jock radio talk show host Denise announces her nation-wide search for her birth mother and jokes that she'll kill her if she doesn't want anything to do with her.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Albert determines that neither Leo nor Jacques killed Laura, but he is unable find any leads into who shot Cooper. Cooper says they must find the third man, who he believes to be Bob, the gray-haired man.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Ronette is attacked in her hospital bed by an unseen person. Jean Renault, brother of Jacques and Bernard, plans to blackmail Ben Horne for the release of Audrey. Donna meets with Harold Smith, a shut-in who had befriended Laura.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol receive disturbing news of an eyewitness account that Jan stole someone else's bicycle from the park.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby develops a Napoleon complex, especially after Greg has to save him from a situation caused in part because he ended up doing something he wasn't supposed to since he was too small to handle the job.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg loses a bet to Bobby and has to be his slave for a week.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter writes a newspaper column to win points with his teacher.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike - along with everyone else - debate where he should be when Gloria is in the delivery room giving birth to their baby.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie rips up a chain letter, thinking it to be nothing more than baloney. Then a whole bunch of accidents happen. Coincidence or did Archie really set off the string of mishaps?

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Gloria gets her paycheck in the mail, it is good news and bad news. The good news is that the check is more than she expected. The bad news is that the check also comes enclosed with a pink slip.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is unhappy with Edith doing volunteer work at The Sunshine home for seniors and he demands she quit.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's company physical is fast approaching, and he needs to remain calm for an entire weekend for the blood pressure test. Of course, a variety of situations arise that test Archie's ability to keep an even temper.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria, now in her seventh month, is feeling unattractive. Added to that is the fact that Mike is tutoring an attractive young woman in Economics and suspects that something else might be going on.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Mike argue over the religious upbringing of baby Joey during a Thanksgiving Day dinner.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's son Vint and his two children stop by to do some laundry. But while there, Vint ends up revealing that he has gotten evicted and they need a place to stay. Mama tells them they can move in with her.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi comes over and announces that she has sold her home and is going to move away. After drinking and celebrating, they return to Mama's, and Naomi ends up spending the night. Vint ends up asking Naomi to marry him.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi and Vint's wedding is coming up. While the women are having a little party, Ellen is worried that her husband Bruce is having an affair, and the family tries to tell her that he is not.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The day of the wedding has come, and Mama is under a lot of stress trying to clean the house for the ceremony. She gives Vint her late husband's sapphire ring and tells him to not let Eunice know because she wants it.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint tells the family about his plan on taking Mama, Ellen, Naomi, and Buzz with him to play Family Feud. Mama is against going, but Vint tells her they need her because she is an important factor, being the "sweet old lady."

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Eunice is given a surprise birthday party at the Bigger Jigger. The party soon takes a nasty turn, and Mama and Eunice get into a fight. They get arrested after accidentally hitting two police officers and have to share a cell.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Though Mama doesn't have experience, she lands a job as a receptionist. She is fired because of constant distractions from her family whose problems she solves quickly once she returns home.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Buzz and Sonja are getting ready for Homecoming, and Vint tells Sonja she has to be home early because she is a girl. When an angry Sonja returns home late, she and Mama have a talk, and Mama defends her rights as a woman.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama runs into an an old flame, Woody Miller, who she is going out to dinner with. After dinner, the two go up to a cabin by the lake, against her family's wishes. She ends up going home the same day to the relief of her family.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Fran and Vint both have big nights which they are nervous about and ask Mama to iron clothes for them. Mama accidentally ruins Fran's dress and forgets to iron Vint's shirt because she isn't paying attention.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al must prove himself a man so his father-in-law will take Peggy's mom back home.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bumped from their fishing lodge cabin, Al and Jefferson seek revenge against actress Shannon Tweed.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al forces Peggy's mom to get a job right before Christmas.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy takes Al and her parents to a marriage therapy retreat.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Daru somehow manages to repair the time machine, and Suzuha learns the truth about her long-lost father before traveling back to 1975 for one final, desperate attempt to change the future.

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Okabe and Makise realize that they cannot save Mayuri without the IBN-5100, but to find the missing computer, they must erase every D-Mail they ever sent.

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Next on the list of D-Mails to erase, Ruka will only surrender her femininity if Okabe agrees to be her boyfriend for a day.

programme.title: Steins;Gate

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Okabe's quest to save Mayuri and return to the original timeline leads him to an unexpected but all too familiar source, and he may not be prepared to handle the truth about those closest to him.

programme.title: Steins;Gate

programme.title: Steins;Gate
programme.desc: Okabe and Makise find themselves faced with the unthinkable situation of saying goodbye before their time together really even began, and struggle to admit their true feelings before it's too late.

programme.title: Steins;Gate

programme.title: How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom
programme.desc: Gaius leads an invasion force from Amidonia into the kingdom and lays siege to the city of Altomura; while Red Dragon City receives its own surprise attack, in Randel, the Forbidden Army constructs a fort from which they engage Georg's forces.

programme.title: How A Realist Hero Rebuilt The Kingdom
programme.desc: Souma and his entourage confront Vargas in his castle before hurrying off to Randel to regroup with the Forbidden Army.

programme.title: How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom
programme.desc: The Amidonian army launches a full-scale attack to retake Van under Gaius's command, but Souma and his forces move to stop them; after the war, there are serious consequences to be faced and plans for reconciliation.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vacaciones familiares se convierten en una pesadilla cuando a una mujer la encuentran boca abajo en un lago.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un tiroteo desde un vehículo deja un hombre muerto y otro gravemente herido. Las llamadas de teléfonos celulares y los casquillos de bala apuntan a un sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una mordidita
programme.desc: En la escena de un crimen, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato, varios pelos extraños y huellas dactilares desconocidas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: All Anya wants for her 18th birthday is a kiss from her favourite doctor. But when he tells her he’s off to Africa to help the poor, and she gets rejected from TU (the only school she applied to), she wants to go along. But will he share her enthusiasm?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is terrified that Vince will come for him and he’s unable to function normally. He pushes away Bianca and when she tries to make it right, she only causes Drew more pain.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dave and Adam want to co-host an in-school radio show. Dave has concerns because Adam is transgender. When Dave voices his discomfort over the airwaves, the school turns against him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli’s got the perfect distraction to get over Clare—writing the school play for director, Fiona. But when writer’s block gets the best of him, Eli realizes his new anti-anxiety meds are to blame.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Old man Oscar Hemmings is being wheeled into surgery. As he is pushed through the halls, he has his lawyer, Mr. Bendix, take the names of doctors and workers in the hallway.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Journalist Ellen Sharp is meeting Phil Gwynn at a nightclub; apparently, he has a big scoop for her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: High-power and high-profile defense attorney, Roger Calendar, is brought into the emergency room with a near-fatal stabbing wound.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lt. Steve Sloan and his partner, Cheryl, pick up their favorite strawberry milkshakes, Steve is distracted by a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Calvin Laird, Mark and Steve's neighbor, threatens his girlfriend violently when she challenges his mean behavior. His repeated playing of loud music bothers the Sloans to no end.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A film school buddy of Alex's is at Community General Hospital making a documentary about the legend of a ghost in the basement.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to 'own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of 'Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: The guys cover MIG and TIG welding while working on a 1972 Chevy truck.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: The guys lengthen the wheelbase on a Jeep for better off-road handling.

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.desc: The crew sinks their teeth into a legendary '77 Bandit Trans Am.

programme.desc: The T-Top of a classic '77 Bandit Trans Am needs strengthening.

programme.desc: The crew transforms an iconic '70 Chevelle into a drag car.

programme.desc: The team performs open-car surgery to create a chop-top '70 Chevelle.

programme.desc: Joe stumbles across a one-owner Ford Galaxie with only 60,000 miles on it.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: For his 50th birthday, a former pro wrestler restores a 1965 Ford Falcon.

programme.desc: A return customer's prized Chevy 5-window truck might be unsalvageable.

programme.desc: A '57 Chevy looks great, but the guys discover that looks can be deceiving.

programme.desc: Joe and the crew put the finishing touches on the big-block '57 Bel Air.

programme.desc: Joe and crew turn a salvaged '51 Chevy pickup into a Christmas spectacle.

programme.desc: Joe and the team finish up the '51 Chevy 3100 Christmas-parade truck.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: UNIT is at a project run by Professor Stahlman who intends to penetrate Earth's crust.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Transported to a parallel world, the Doctor discovers that England is under military rule.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: In the parallel world, the drilling project is about to penetrate the Earth's crust.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: In the parallel world, Earth's crust has been penetrated, releasing terrible forces.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: As the parallel world faces destruction, the Doctor is desperate to return to his world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor has escaped the doomed, parallel Earth and has returned to his own world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master paves the way for an invasion by the insidious Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master uses his hypnotic powers to take control of a factory where he creates Autons.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The only clue to the Master's plans is a single plastic daffodil.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master is broadcasting an activation signal to open a channel for the Nestenes.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tests a machine designed to extract evil particles from the brains of convicted criminals.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Prisoners revolt at the institute where the mind machine is being tested.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Master and fitted with a telepathic amplifier.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor decides to destroy the parasite in the mind machine, but it has dematerialized.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master and Doctor join forces to destroy the machine.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master bargains for the dematerialization circuit for his time machine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the Doctor and Jo to the future where colonists are menaced by a monster.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Interplanetary Mining Corporation, led by Captain Dent, arrives on the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When Jo attempts to break into the IMC ship she is captured and held hostage.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master pretends to have come to settle the dispute between the colonists and IMC.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master forces the Doctor to take him to the underground city of the primitives.

programme.desc: The Doctor and the Master confront the guardian of the doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive Shar-Pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes to the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpark in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a Dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A famous civil war photographer realizes he may be taking his last picture after Dr. Mike discovers that he is going blind.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike breaks the rules to enter her new horse in an important race.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must prove that Loren’s sister-in-law did not murder her abusive husband.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A dead man walks when Halloween comes to Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake is accused of killing a Cheyenne brave, and the incident disrupts the town, as well as the friendship between Sully and Cloud Dancing.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike clashes with a traveling faith healer over a cure for Kid Cole’s tuberculosis.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Michaela returns to Boston to visit her ailing mother, Sully must act before he loses her.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Michaela returns to Boston to visit her ailing mother, Sully must act before he loses her.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A severe drought threatens -- and divides -- Colorado Springs at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike suspects that Dorothy is spending time with Sully, and Becky thinks Colleen stole her boyfriend.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The children hide a wounded Sully from the cavalry, which has put a bounty on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike sees Christmas past, present and future with the help of a beloved friend.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Matthew is trapped in a mine cave and Sully is his only hope for rescue.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A typhus epidemic spreads at Black Kettle's camp, and Dr. Mike feels responsible.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital, and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Blake is departing for Singapore to identify his son, Alexis intercepts him at the airport to assure him she will not be stopped from merging their respective companies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake persuades Steven to return to Denver for his son's sake; the rest of the Carringtons are emotional, learning that Steven's alive and returning home; once home, Steven reunites with Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis that they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake confronts Alexis with evidence of fraudulent figures involved in the recent merger; Alexis learns that Blake's lucrative oil extraction process does not extend to Colbyco. Newlyweds Jeff and Kirby have their first fight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns that Steven's attorney, Chris, has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis receives a note from the late Joseph, who set the fire with the intention of killing her; Claudia is released from the sanitarium; Steven and Blake fight over little Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby physically attacks Alexis, demanding to know the reason Joseph wanted her dead; at the trial for custody of little Danny, Alexis testifies against Blake, who erupts in anger.

programme.desc: Cam and M-Chuck are scrutinized by a district attorney; Uncle Julius feuds with a neighbor who won't take responsibility for his dog's actions.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cassie returns to the dating world and her determination to get what she wants sets her on a collision course with Cam; Reggie meets the peculiar and brilliant man who made Flaherty all his money.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and Charity oppose Lady Mae's reaction to demands from the Deacon Board; the Bishop visits his father-in-law and runs into Mac; Kerissa and Jacob prepare to move out; Grace goes out with Darius Nash, a journalist following Calvary.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: After one of Mac's victims attempts suicide, Grace makes a rash move that may have lasting consequences; Kevin's mother visits, exposing old wounds; Lady Mae tries to make Jacob see reason.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Bishop and Lady Mae preside over Calvary's Fall Revival, and decide to take action against Basie; Both Lady Mae and Grace connect with old friends; Grace confronts Mac's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: When Basie hears about the injunction filed to stop construction of Triumph Two, he stages a sit-in at Calvary in an attempt to force Bishop's hand; Grace's plan to put Mac away hits a snag.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Kevin and Charity begin divorce proceedings, but the circumstances are exacerbated when Lady Mae learns the truth about Kevin; Grace and Darius's relationship reaches a stalemate.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The anniversary of Faith's death is at hand and Grace shows no sign of giving up her pursuit of Mac; Triumph Pastor Basie Skanks and Jacob receive bad news regarding Triumph Two's finances.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob makes Basie an offer to clear his debt and gain full control of Triumph II; Mac receives bad news from Skip Leonard, which puts him an explosive collision course with Grace.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Paz, still grieving Angela's death, seeks allies in the pursuit of justice or vengeance so she forms an alliance with Warner; they hatch a plan to arrest Ghost for the murder of Angela, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy is on a path to avenge LaKeisha's murder; Elisa Marie investigates what's on the USB stick given to her by her father; Tommy must destroy the evidence, and he may need Ghost's help to retrieve it.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Tate tasks Dre to kill Ghost; Tate's hatred toward St. Patrick motivates him to lie during a Federal questioning; the Feds are in striking distance of convicting St. Patrick for Silver's murder.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: When Ghost is announced as Lt. Governor it gives him a solid win and puts him one step closer to a fully legitimate world; he soon discovers one of his many enemies carrying out a plan that changes his life forever.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The €100,000 Super High Roller reaches its finale with six elite players vying for nearly €1.4 million. 2015 Monte Carlo Main Event champion Adrian Mateos faces off against poker heavyweights Mikita Badziakouski, László Bujtas, and Marius Gierse.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: After a three-year hiatus, the prestigious EPT Monte Carlo €5,000 Main Event returns in spectacular fashion. Day 2 brings together poker's biggest names.

programme.title: Coaches' Corner
programme.desc: Three former U.S. Men's National Team head coaches join host Rob Stone to break down the World Cup through the eyes of the men who've actually made the toughest decisions on soccer's biggest stage.

programme.title: PDC Darts Classics
programme.desc: FanDuel TV Extra is your new home for live sports, professional poker action, and betting insight. Watch and wager in real-time on horse racing, international basketball, soccer, and much more. Make every moment more with FanDuel!

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Tension mounts as the money bubble approaches in Monte Carlo's Main Event. With 159 players set to cash for at least €8,690, every decision matters. EPT legends Patrik Antonius and Davidi Kitai command the feature table.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The money bubble has burst, but for seasoned pro Ole Schemion-who has earned over $5 million in Monte Carlo alone-a minimum cash isn't enough. He faces a formidable challenge from French star Gaëlle Baumann and online legend Jussi Nevanlinna.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: PSPC champion Ramon Colillas surges into the top five as just 40 players remain in the EPT Monte Carlo Main Event. Day 3 intensifies as competitors battle to reach the final two tables.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The field narrows to just 16 survivors, including EPT Dublin champion Niall Farrell and PSPC winner Ramon Colillas. With over €41,000 already locked up, the stakes couldn't be higher as players fight for their place at the final table of nine.

programme.title: Coaches' Corner
programme.desc: Three former U.S. Men's National Team head coaches join host Rob Stone to break down the World Cup through the eyes of the men who've actually made the toughest decisions on soccer's biggest stage.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Nine players remain, but only six will advance to the final day with a shot at nearly €1 million and poker immortality. Can PSPC champion Ramon Colillas extend his remarkable run to another major final table, or will his epic journey end?

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The moment of truth arrives at the EPT Monte Carlo final table. Six players-two businessmen, one qualifier, and three seasoned professionals-wage the ultimate battle for almost €1 million and the coveted EPT trophy.

programme.title: The Swordsman [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: A kung-fu manual known as the sacred scroll is stolen from the Emperor's library. An army detachment is sent to recover it. Meanwhile, a young swordsman and his fellow disciple are accidentally drawn into the chaos.

programme.title: Swordsman II [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: Ling Wu Chung decides to hide from the chaotic world. Before leaving, he visits his friends, a tribe of snake-wielding women warriors. However, he finds that the tribe have been attacked, and their leader Yam Ying Ying has been abducted.

programme.title: The Legend [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: This Hong Kong martial-arts extravaganza tells of evil emperors and true love. The secret Red Lotus Flower Society is committed to the overthrow of the evil Manchu Emperor and his minions.

programme.title: The Legend 2 [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: The Cantonese hero Fong Sai Yuk becomes involved in the secret brotherhood "The Red Flower", who are trying to overthrow the Manchurian emperor and re-establishing the Ming dynasty.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Legend of the Red Dragon
programme.desc: A young father and his infant son are beset by forces of evil and corruption. They wander China, upholding their sense of honor and protecting the weak. When they are forced into combat, spectacular and hilarious fast-motion kung fu sequences follow.

programme.title: The Bodyguard from Beijing [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: A corrupt businessman commits a murder and the only witness is the girlfriend of another businessman with close connections to the Chinese government.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.
